title: Repeatable enhancement of healthcare data with social determinants of health.
ehr_evidence: linking compiled consumer data to patient records in Electronic Health Records
summary: A proof-of-concept study developing a repeatable process to enrich Electronic Health Records (EHR) with social determinants of health (SDOH) data from commercial consumer sources.
key_findings: SDOH factors like home-ownership, marital-status, presence of children, number of members per household, economic stability and education were significantly different between the COVID-19 positive and negative patient groups
estimated family-income and home market-value were not significantly different
limitations: Data coverage and match rate variability
data_availability_statement: The datasets presented in this article are not readily available because it contains clinical information. Requests to access the datasets should be directed to mlgreer@uams.edu.
